name: Data Structures and Algorithms Learning Path
description: A comprehensive, hierarchical mind map designed for software engineers to master Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA). This roadmap breaks down the field into three primary pillars: Complexity Analysis (the mathematical foundation), Data Structures (how we organize data), and Algorithmic Paradigms (how we solve problems). It transitions from basic linear structures to complex non-linear graphs and advanced optimization techniques like Dynamic Programming.
code:
graph LR
  Root((DSA Mastery)) --> Foundations
  Root --> Structures
  Root --> Paradigms

  subgraph Foundations [1. Complexity & Foundations]
    F1[Big O / Omega / Theta Notation]
    F2[Space vs Time Complexity]
    F3[Recursion & Memoization]
    F4[Bit Manipulation]
  end

  subgraph Structures [2. Data Structures]
    subgraph Linear [Linear Structures]
      L1[Arrays & Dynamic Arrays]
      L2[Strings & Pattern Matching]
      L3[Linked Lists - Singly/Doubly]
      L4[Stacks & Queues]
    end
    subgraph NonLinear [Non-Linear Structures]
      N1[Trees - BST, AVL, Segment]
      N2[Tries - Prefix Trees]
      N3[Heaps - Min/Max, Priority Queues]
      N4[Graphs - Matrix/Adjacency List]
      N5[Hash Tables & Collisions]
    end
  end

  subgraph Paradigms [3. Algorithmic Patterns]
    subgraph SearchSort [Searching & Sorting]
      A1[Binary Search]
      A2[Merge/Quick/Heap Sort]
      A3[BFS / DFS Traversal]
    end
    subgraph Logic [Optimization Patterns]
      P1[Two Pointers]
      P2[Sliding Window]
      P3[Greedy Algorithms]
      P4[Backtracking]
      P5[Dynamic Programming - Top-down/Bottom-up]
      P6[Topological Sort / Dijkstra]
    end
  end

  %% Styling the Root Node
  style Root fill:#0f172a,stroke:#334155,stroke-width:4px,color:#fff

  %% Styling Subgraphs for transparency and visibility
  style Foundations fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Structures fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Paradigms fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style Linear fill:transparent,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 2 2
  style NonLinear fill:transparent,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 2 2
  style SearchSort fill:transparent,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 2 2
  style Logic fill:transparent,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 2 2

  %% Individual Node Styling
  classDef item fill:#ffffff,stroke:#1e293b,stroke-width:1px,color:#000
  class F1,F2,F3,F4,L1,L2,L3,L4,N1,N2,N3,N4,N5,A1,A2,A3,P1,P2,P3,P4,P5,P6 item
